message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.8

Ship fixes for:
- #43: macOS arm64 AMFI SIGKILL (ad-hoc codesign runs in release.yml for
  both arm64 and x64 macOS builds, with post-build exec smoke test).
- #44: OpenAI strict-mode schema violation in reflect/validate/audit
  (schemas are strict-compliant with nullable unions + additionalProperties:false).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "cass-memory",
-  "version": "0.2.7",
+  "version": "0.2.8",
   "type": "module",
   "description": "Universal memory system for AI coding agents - implements ACE framework",
   "author": "Jeffrey Emanuel",
